india_trends.title: Top Gainers & Losers on May 15: HUDCO, Muthoot Finance, Voltas, IOCL, Vedanta, HAL, Aditya Infotech among top losers
india_trends.summary: On May 15, Indian markets declined, with Nifty down 0.18% and Sensex down 0.25%. Selling in financial and metal stocks offset IT sector gains. The rupee hit a record low of 96.5 against the dollar, influenced by foreign investor withdrawals and rising crude oil prices.

india_trends.title: Shakti Press rights issue date extended. Size, allotment date, other details
india_trends.summary: Shakti Press Ltd has extended its rights issue closing date to May 29, 2026, from May 18, 2026, to give shareholders more time to participate. The extension was approved during a May 11 meeting, prompting a nearly 5% stock increase.

india_trends.title: A Rs 3 hike makes India’s inflation battle somewhat harder
india_trends.summary: Indian Oil Marketing Companies have increased petrol and diesel prices by Rs 3 per litre each, and CNG by Rs 2/kg, following daily losses of Rs 1,000-1,200 crore due to the Iran war. This move is expected to add inflationary pressure, impacting transportation, logistics, and retail goods costs.

india_trends.title: Global Markets | European shares tumble on Iran war-linked inflation woes
india_trends.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump, on the last day of his trip ‌to China, said ⁠his patience ⁠with Iran was running out and that China's President Xi Jinping agreed that Tehran must not be allowed to develop nuclear ​weapons and should reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

india_trends.title: Goldline Pharmaceutical IPO allotment date in focus today; latest GMP, step-by-step guide to check status
india_trends.summary: Goldline Pharmaceutical IPO allotment finalisation occurs today, 15 May. Investors can check their allocation status on Bigshare Services Pvt Ltd. The IPO was oversubscribed 840.74 times, and the listing is set for 19 May, with shares credited to demat accounts on 18 May.
